message:
fix(buffer): waker accumulation + close-without-wake bugs

1. Waker dedup: replaced last()-only check with iter().any() full scan.
   Previous code only compared against the last waker in the list, causing
   unbounded O(N*polls) growth when multiple concurrent tasks alternated
   polling. Now correctly deduplicates across all registered wakers.

2. close() now wakes all parked tasks: both ready_wakers (waiting for
   capacity) and inner_wakers (waiting for inner service readiness) are
   drained and woken when the buffer is closed. Previously, tasks parked
   before close() would hang indefinitely.

3. Added closed-state check at top of WaitingForReady poll path so that
   woken futures observe the closed state and return BufferError::Closed
   instead of trying to acquire the inner service lock.

4 regression tests added (28 total pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
